intended_rule: Close the remaining 2 SOXL shares when the executable price breaks the residual 240 cleanup trigger; do not re-add.
actual_execution: Confirmed sell of remaining 2 SOXL shares at 239.34 USD for 478.68 USD. Position transitioned from 2 shares to 0 shares.
account_risk_improvement: SOXL leveraged exposure was fully removed. Across both cleanup fills, 5 shares were sold for approximately 1,222.68 USD before fees.
short_term_price_outcome: Subsequent SOXL market prices around 176.98-182.54 support the cleanup effectiveness, but correctness remains based on rule compliance and risk reduction.
review_conclusion: SOXL cleanup completed. Position state changed from residual_watch_position to closed_position and active SOXL risk monitoring should be retired.
lessons_learned: First SOXL cleanup sold 3 shares at 248.00 USD for about 744.00 USD.
Residual cleanup sold 2 shares at 239.34 USD for about 478.68 USD.
Total SOXL cleanup sold 5 shares for about 1,222.68 USD before fees.
Closed positions belong in the historical cleanup ledger, not the active risk-valve list.
next_rule_update: Set SOXL position to 0 shares, state to closed_position, and enforce do_not_readd.
